other.name: Chilean sea bass fillets, 6 oz portions

dry.name: Olive oil or neutral oil (for frying)

masterIngredients.name: ½ cup apple cider vinegar (or white balsamic vinegar)
½ cup Carrot Ginger Dressing (see above)
½ teaspoon Diamond Crystal kosher salt
¼ teaspoon freshly ground black pepper
2 medium carrots (peeled into strips or julienned)
2 pounds red cabbage (cored and thinly sliced)
Bell peppers (red, yellow, orange), quartered and seeded
Chilean sea bass fillets, 6 oz portions
Grilled chicken breast, diced (optional chef's style)
Olive oil or neutral oil (for frying)
Salmon, skin-on or skinless, 4�6 oz portions
White fish fillets (cod, haddock), 6 oz portions
